channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-424] conf-sanity test 55, 56, 58 do not work with separate MGS and MDT
item.description:
While running conf-sanity with separate MGS and MDT devices, test 55, 56 and 58 failed as follows:

== test 55: check lov_objid size == 16:48:16
<~snip~>
start mgs
Starting mgs: -o user_xattr,acl  /dev/sdb7 /mnt/mgs
fat-amd-1-ib: lnet.debug=0x33f1504
fat-amd-1-ib: lnet.subsystem_debug=0xffb7e3ff
fat-amd-1-ib: lnet.debug_mb=48
Started MGS
start mds service on fat-amd-1-ib
Starting mds: -o user_xattr,acl  /dev/sdb5 /mnt/mds
fat-amd-1-ib: lnet.debug=0x33f1504
fat-amd-1-ib: lnet.subsystem_debug=0xffb7e3ff
fat-amd-1-ib: lnet.debug_mb=48
Started lustre-MDT0000
start ost1 service on fat-amd-2-ib
Starting ost1:   /dev/sdb5 /mnt/ost1
fat-amd-2-ib: lnet.debug=0x33f1504
fat-amd-2-ib: lnet.subsystem_debug=0xffb7e3ff
fat-amd-2-ib: lnet.debug_mb=48
Started lustre-OST0000
mount lustre on /mnt/lustre.....
Starting client: client-10-ib: -o user_xattr,acl,flock fat-amd-1-ib@o2ib:/lustre /mnt/lustre
lnet.debug=0x33f1504
lnet.subsystem_debug=0xffb7e3ff
lnet.debug_mb=48
Stopping clients: client-10-ib,client-12-ib /mnt/lustre (opts:)
Stopping client client-10-ib /mnt/lustre opts:
Stopping clients: client-10-ib,client-12-ib /mnt/lustre2 (opts:)
Stopping /mnt/mds (opts:-f)
Stopping /mnt/ost1 (opts:-f)
Stopping /mnt/mgs (opts:)
start mds service on fat-amd-1-ib
Starting mds: -o user_xattr,acl  /dev/sdb5 /mnt/mds
fat-amd-1-ib: lnet.debug=0x33f1504
fat-amd-1-ib: lnet.subsystem_debug=0xffb7e3ff
fat-amd-1-ib: lnet.debug_mb=48
Started lustre-MDT0000
start ost1 service on fat-amd-2-ib
Starting ost1:   /dev/sdb5 /mnt/ost1
fat-amd-2-ib: lnet.debug=0x33f1504
fat-amd-2-ib: lnet.subsystem_debug=0xffb7e3ff
fat-amd-2-ib: lnet.debug_mb=48
Started lustre-OST0000
mount lustre on /mnt/lustre.....
Starting client: client-10-ib: -o user_xattr,acl,flock fat-amd-1-ib@o2ib:/lustre /mnt/lustre
mount.lustre: mount fat-amd-1-ib@o2ib:/lustre at /mnt/lustre failed: Cannot send after transport endpoint shutdown
 conf-sanity test_55: @@@@@@ FAIL: client start failed

== test 56: check big indexes == 16:52:20
<~snip~>
start mds service on fat-amd-1-ib
Starting mds: -o user_xattr,acl  /dev/sdb5 /mnt/mds
fat-amd-1-ib: mount.lustre: mount /dev/sdb5 at /mnt/mds failed: Interrupted system call
mount -t lustre  /dev/sdb5 /mnt/mds
Start of /dev/sdb5 on mds failed 4
start ost1 service on fat-amd-2-ib
Starting ost1:   /dev/sdb5 /mnt/ost1
fat-amd-2-ib: mount.lustre: mount /dev/sdb5 at /mnt/ost1 failed: Interrupted system call
mount -t lustre  /dev/sdb5 /mnt/ost1
Start of /dev/sdb5 on ost1 failed 4
start ost2 service on fat-amd-2-ib
Starting ost2:   /dev/sdb6 /mnt/ost2
fat-amd-2-ib: mount.lustre: mount /dev/sdb6 at /mnt/ost2 failed: Interrupted system call
mount -t lustre  /dev/sdb6 /mnt/ost2
Start of /dev/sdb6 on ost2 failed 4
 conf-sanity test_56: @@@@@@ FAIL: Unable to start second ost 

== test 58: missing llog files must not prevent MDT from mounting == 16:54:59
start mds service on fat-amd-1-ib
Starting mds: -o user_xattr,acl  /dev/sdb5 /mnt/mds
fat-amd-1-ib: mount.lustre: mount /dev/sdb5 at /mnt/mds failed: Interrupted system call
mount -t lustre  /dev/sdb5 /mnt/mds
Start of /dev/sdb5 on mds failed 4
 conf-sanity test_58: @@@@@@ FAIL: MDT start failed

Maloo report: https://maloo.whamcloud.com/test_sets/f868fa00-97e8-11e0-9a27-52540025f9af

These are test script issues. The MGS service was not started.
item.environment:
Lustre Branch: v1_8_6_RC2
Lustre Build: http://newbuild.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-b1_8/80/
e2fsprogs Build: http://newbuild.whamcloud.com/job/e2fsprogs-master/40/
Distro/Arch: RHEL6/x86_64(patchless client, in-kernel OFED, kernel version: 2.6.32-131.2.1.el6)
                    RHEL5/x86_64(server, OFED 1.5.3.1, kernel version: 2.6.18-238.12.1.el5_lustre)
Separate MGS and MDT devices.
item.summary: conf-sanity test 55, 56, 58 do not work with separate MGS and MDT

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment:
Integrated in lustre-b1_8 » i686,server,el5,ofa #162
LU-424 tests: conf-sanity test 55, 56, 58 failure fixes (Revision 7cba98a78934681d4ec3fb7e512fd41db110e844)

Result = SUCCESS
Johann Lombardi : 7cba98a78934681d4ec3fb7e512fd41db110e844

Minh

It looks like you are already paying attention to this ticket. Could you please ensure that this fix gets landed to master?

Thanks

Peter
Do you mean for the b1_8 branch as well? For for 2.X master it works.

Hi James,

Since you have the config where mgs and mds are separated, could you confirm that the problem is fixed with your patch? Just to make sure
Problem also exist in Lustre 2.X. Ported of this patch is at http://review.whamcloud.com/#change,1870
Patch for b1_8 is in: http://review.whamcloud.com/955.
